steps.action: Run a default-config CLI review with deterministic reviewer doubles.
steps.expected: CLI exits 0 and the shipped bench executes with concrete prompt/template/provider/model values.
steps.observed: CLI exited 0 with PASS; provider-double preflight launched 6 reviewers and captured 6 reviewer LLM calls.

steps.action: Materialize the default resolved snapshot and planner reference checks.
steps.expected: Bench is non-empty with unique ids and all planner-referenced reviewers resolve.
steps.observed: Resolved snapshot contained 6 unique reviewers; always_include, include_if_code_changed, and fallback_panel all resolved cleanly.

steps.expected: A baseline snapshot is available for diffing.

steps.action: Apply a partial override that changes only trace fields and adds sentinel, then diff the snapshots.
steps.expected: Only targeted reviewer/provider/model/prompt/template fields change while inherited defaults remain stable.
steps.observed: Diff showed trace provider/model/prompt/template changes plus sentinel addition; atlas inherited prompt/template/provider/model remained unchanged.

steps.action: Run a CLI review with override-driven bench/provider/model/prompt/template changes.
steps.expected: CLI exits 0 and the run uses the overridden bench and reviewer settings.
steps.observed: CLI exited 0 with PASS on a 4-reviewer panel.

steps.action: Capture planner and reviewer execution evidence for the overridden run.
steps.expected: Planner sees the updated bench and reviewer execution uses overridden provider/model/prompt/template values.
steps.observed: Planner capture included sentinel in all_reviewers and selected [trace, sentinel, guard, atlas]; reviewer ledger showed trace using deterministic_review + alt_correctness/alt_review and sentinel using deterministic_review.

assertions.title: Invalid config fails with field-level diagnostics

steps.action: Execute invalid override cases covering duplicate ids, dangling refs, invalid provider/model combo, missing asset, unsupported key, wrong type, and unsupported enum strings.
steps.expected: Each invalid case fails during config load/preflight with field-level diagnostics.
steps.observed: All four invalid-case groups reported invalid-config diagnostics with the expected field paths and reasons.

steps.action: Check that planner and reviewer work never starts for invalid configs.
steps.expected: Router and reviewer call counts stay at zero.
steps.observed: All invalid cases recorded router_calls=0 and reviewer_calls=0.

frictions.description: The current override validation surface is runtime-env driven (`Application.put_env(:cerberus_elixir, :cli_overrides, ...)`) instead of a cleaner first-class CLI flag/file surface.
frictions.resolution: Used deterministic `mix run --no-start --no-compile` wrappers that set `:cli_overrides` before invoking the CLI and direct `Cerberus.Config.start_link/1` snapshot/preflight helpers for evidence generation.
